name: Arroz Con Pollo
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Brown the chicken on both sides until cooked through.
3. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic. Fry for a few minutes until fragrant.
4. Stir in the tomato sauce and dissolved saffron with part of the chicken broth, salt, and pepper.
5. Pour in the remaining chicken broth. Bring to a simmer.
6. Cover and cook for 20 minutes.
7. Add the rice and stir well to combine with the liquid.
8. Return the lid and continue cooking until all the liquid is absorbed and the chicken is tender, about 30 more minutes.
